title: Part 8 – Passages multiples : rendez-vous médical et assurance
instructions: Lisez les deux documents, puis répondez aux questions en faisant le lien entre eux.

passages.label: Confirmation de rendez-vous
passages.text:
Appointment Confirmation - Sunrise Medical Center

Patient: Helena Petrov
Doctor: Dr. Okafor
Date: Tuesday, June 24th
Time: 10:30 a.m.
Reason for visit: Annual physical examination

Please arrive 10 minutes early to complete a health questionnaire. Bring a valid photo ID and your insurance card.

If you need to cancel or reschedule, please call at least 24 hours in advance. Cancellations made less than 24 hours before the appointment may be subject to a $25 fee.

passages.label: E-mail de l'assurance
passages.text:
From: HealthFirst Insurance
To: Helena Petrov
Subject: Coverage Update for Annual Check-ups

Dear Ms. Petrov,

We're writing to remind you that, under your current plan, annual physical examinations are fully covered with no co-pay, as long as they are performed by an in-network provider.

Sunrise Medical Center is part of our network, so your upcoming visit on June 24th should not result in any out-of-pocket cost, provided no additional tests are performed during the visit.

If your doctor recommends additional tests or services beyond the standard physical exam, those may be subject to a co-pay depending on the service. We recommend asking your doctor's office for an estimate before agreeing to any additional procedures.

questions.prompt: What is the reason for Helena's appointment?
What should Helena bring to her appointment?
choices: A valid photo ID and insurance card
questions.explanation: "Bring a valid photo ID and your insurance card".

questions.prompt: What fee might apply for a late cancellation?
questions.explanation: "Cancellations made less than 24 hours before the appointment may be subject to a $25 fee".

questions.prompt: According to the insurance email, what is required for the annual exam to be fully covered?
choices: The exam must be performed by an in-network provider
Helena must be over 50 years old
The exam must be scheduled a year in advance
questions.explanation: "annual physical examinations are fully covered with no co-pay, as long as they are performed by an in-network provider", et Sunrise Medical Center fait partie du réseau.

questions.prompt: What does the insurance company recommend if additional tests are suggested?
choices: Ask for a cost estimate before agreeing
questions.explanation: "We recommend asking your doctor's office for an estimate before agreeing to any additional procedures".
